data.title: inMorphis Accelerates the AI-Native Enterprise: Unveiling a High-Velocity Implementation Framework for ServiceNow AI at Knowledge 2026
data.description: In the tech industry, inMorphis, supported by investment from ServiceNow, a leading player, has integrated its delivery system with the recently launched ServiceNow Context Engine and AI Control Tower. This move aims to translate the advanced features of the platform into tangible business outcomes. The development was announced on May 1, 2026 in Las Vegas.

data.title: PetMade Formulates Veterinarian-Approved Dog Supplements for Heart Health Featuring CoQ10 and Omega-3s
data.description: A company in Manassas, Virginia, announced on May 1, 2026, that PetMade has introduced a series of cardiovascular support formulas for dogs. These formulas, approved by veterinarians, aim to uphold healthy circulation, cellular energy, and overall vitality in dogs. The products consist of high-quality ingredients that are easily absorbed by the body, and were developed in consultation with veterinary professionals.

data.title: Dr. Pol Launches Non-Prescription Clinical Nutrition Dog Food Line Available Exclusively at Walmart
data.description: Dr. Jan Pol, a trusted veterinarian, has developed a non-prescription dog food tailored to address common canine issues and serve as an alternative to prescription pet food. Formulated with expertise, this dog food provides targeted nutritional support. The product will be launched in WEIDMAN, Michigan on May 1, 2026. Dr. Pol's expanding pet care portfolio includes this innovative solution for pet owners, offering effective nutritional support without the need for a prescription.

data.title: Trucordia Acquires Paradiso Insurance, Strengthening New England Presence and Main Street Focus
data.description: Today, in Lindon, Utah, Trucordia, one of the top 20 insurance brokerages in the U.S., revealed its acquisition of Paradiso Financial and Insurance Services in Stafford Springs, Connecticut. This strategic move brings Paradiso's well-established business into Trucordia's fold, marking a significant development in the industry. Paradiso Insurance, known for its excellent service, has garnered a loyal customer base in the region.

data.title: ImpediMed Broadens Breast Cancer Survivorship Monitoring with the SOZO® Digital Health Platform at ASBrS 2026
data.description: Key presentations at the American Society of Breast Surgeons conference in 2026 emphasized the significance of tracking body composition, Bioimpedance Spectroscopy (BIS), and monitoring for lymphedema in breast cancer treatment. Held in Carlsbad, Calif., the event featured critical research findings on these topics. One of the prominent companies showcasing their advancements was ImpediMed, renowned for its innovative medical solutions for monitoring and addressing fluid levels and body composition. The conference highlighted the growing importance of incorporating such technologies in breast cancer care.

data.title: Pennsylvania American Water Highlights Local Infrastructure Needs as AWWA issues New Report on U.S. Water Systems
data.description: In Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania, on May 1, 2026, Pennsylvania American Water emphasizes the importance of sustained investments in the United States' water infrastructure after the publication of a recent study by the American Water Works Association (AWWA). The report, known as "Beyond the Replacement Era," underscores the criticality of addressing aging water systems across the nation.

data.title: Sequenex Announces Partnership with MedTech Innovator, Industry’s Leading Startup Accelerator
data.description: Sequenex has revealed a new collaboration with MedTech Innovator, the leading accelerator for medical technology firms worldwide. MedTech Innovator connects industry experts with inventive early-stage medtech companies to offer guidance and assistance. By 2026, MedTech Innovator plans to choose 65 startups to join its initiative. Through this partnership, Sequenex will engage with handpicked emerging companies, offering not only mentorship but also financial backing to MedTech Innovator.

data.title: SuperTruth Launches Sean's Friends Donor Advised Fund and Commits That the Company Will Never Profit From Children
data.description: SuperTruth, a healthcare data verification company, recently announced its commitment to donate its first grant to the Children's Hospital of Philadelphia. This founding principle ensures that all future proceeds from pediatric projects will be directed back into the fund. The company, based in Philadelphia, made this significant decision on May 1, 2026.

data.title: Fortune Minerals Announces Repayment of Maturing Debts
data.description: Fortune Minerals Limited has recently signed agreements to raise C$10 million in gross proceeds and pay off debts amounting to around C$11.84 million due on April 30, 2026. The company has entered a new funding deal with Lind Global Fund III, LP to achieve this. Interested individuals may find more information on Fortune's website at www.fortuneminerals.com.

data.title: Glen Burnie Bancorp Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: In Glen Burnie, Maryland on May 1, 2026, Glen Burnie Bancorp, known as the bank holding company for The Bank of Glen Burnie, disclosed their financial results. They reported a net income of $84,000, which translates to $0.03 per diluted common share, for the first quarter of 2026. This is a significant improvement compared to the net loss of $95,000, or $(0.03) per diluted common share, in the fourth quarter of 2025. Additionally, in the first quarter of 2025, the company reported a net income of $153,000, or $0.05 per diluted common share.
Dave McCormick has reported recent stock transactions.

data.title: Investor Group Led by Former IBERIABANK Leaders Daryl Byrd, Mark Tipton, Michael Brown, and Scott Price Announces the Closing of Merger with MC Bancshares, Inc.
data.description: An investor group, DMMS Purchaser, Inc., led by former IBERIABANK Corp., raised more than $225 million from 550+ investors. The strong capital infusion highlights investor confidence in the leadership team and future of the bank. This significant financial commitment underscores optimism in the growth prospects and strategic direction of the institution.

data.title: Moderna's Legal Hit Steals Spotlight From Strong Sales
data.description: Shares of Moderna Inc. (NASDAQ: MRNA) dropped following the company's announcement of a first-quarter net loss, attributed to a litigation settlement charge. Despite this, their revenue surpassed Wall Street expectations, reaching $389 million compared to the estimated $227.97 million. The company reported a first-quarter adjusted loss of $1.18 per share, better than the anticipated loss of $3.81 per share, considering that the adjusted figure excludes litigation-related expenses of $2.22 per share. The increase in net product sales was mainly driven by higher sales of the COVID-19 vaccine in international markets, a result of deliveries under long-term strategic partnerships with government entities.

data.title: Mazda Reports April Sales Results
data.description: In Irvine, California, Mazda North American Operations (MNAO) announced that they recorded 31,128 vehicle sales in April 2026, marking a 17.3% drop from the previous year. Year-to-date sales reached 125,601 vehicles, reflecting a 15.1% decrease compared to the same period in the prior year.
